Enemy - Class in io.github.fiitgame.Enemy
The Enemy class is an abstract class that represents a generic enemy in the game.

enemyCanBeImpacted(Enemy) - Method in class io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles.MeleeProjectile
Checks if the enemy can by damaged depending on if it was already impacted by this projectile during its lifetime.
